# review-metrics

> Deep-dive into per-type CodeHealth metrics from a unilyze snapshot. Pulls evidence packs for the worst types with `unilyze query --worst`, reads their source, and classifies each finding into a refactoring strategy or a downstream review skill. Does NOT refactor, does NOT run hotspot/dup, and does NOT evaluate assembly-level metrics — those belong to other unity-review skills.

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install bigdra50/skills/unity/review-metrics
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - bigdra50/skills/unity/review-metrics
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients).

With the [`skills`](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) CLI (installs into
every detected agent's skills directory):

```bash
npx skills add bigdra50/skills --skill review-metrics
```

Or copy the folder in directly:

```bash
npx degit bigdra50/skills/unity/review-metrics ~/.claude/skills/review-metrics
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
